data.title: Bitcoin plunges to bear market territory after a volatile year, impacting Trump's crypto progress. Important info for investors.
data.description: A year filled with optimism regarding more favorable regulation led to the bitcoin price reaching all-time highs before plummeting into a bear market. This unpredictability has raised concerns about the progress of cryptocurrency under the Trump administration. Investors should be mindful of these fluctuations and their potential impact on the market.

data.title: Global Mining Automation Market experiencing growth due to productivity, safety, cost efficiency focus. Key technologies include autonomous haulage systems, AI fleet management.
data.description: The Mining Automation Market is witnessing continuous growth worldwide due to the industry's focus on improving productivity, enhancing safety, and achieving cost efficiency. This is supported by the rapid adoption of autonomous haulage systems, AI-powered fleet management, robotics, and real-time technologies. Key drivers of this trend include a growing emphasis on maximizing output, minimizing operational risks, and reducing overall expenses. Global market assessments project substantial growth, with the market expected to reach a value of $X billion by 20XX, reflecting a Y% increase from the previous year. This momentum is expected to continue as mining companies increasingly invest in advanced automation solutions to streamline operations and stay competitive in the market.

data.title: Five luxury model homes to debut at Ironridge in Montebello, CA on Feb. 14; announced by Toll Brothers.
data.description: Five brand new high-end model residences will be unveiled during the Grand Opening Event on February 14th.

data.title: Atlanta Braves and Gray Media will broadcast 15 live Spring Training games across the Southeast on free TV, reaching 26 markets.
data.description: Live coverage of Braves Spring Training baseball games will now be available in 26 markets through the program Braves on Gray. This expansion ensures that fans in these markets can enjoy live broadcasts of the games, reaching a larger audience than before. The move to increase coverage to 26 markets is significant as it allows more viewers to tune in and follow the team during the Spring Training season. This represents an increase in coverage compared to previous seasons, providing fans with more opportunities to watch the games live. Overall, this development highlights the commitment to offering extensive coverage of the Braves Spring Training games to a wider audience.

data.title: Performance Brokerage Services facilitates sale of Cordelia RV in Fairfield, California to Bish's RV. Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: Leading dealership buy-sell entity, Performance Brokerage Services, recently facilitated the sale of Cordelia RV in Fairfield, California. The dealership was transitioned from JC Foreman to Bish's RV. This transaction took place in Irvine, California and was finalized on February 13, 2026. Performance Brokerage Services is recognized as the top performer in North America in terms of dealership transactions.

data.title: Noble Corp reports Q4 earnings: 9 cents/share, $764.412M in sales, FY2026 sales outlook $2.8B-$3.0B. Mixed results prompt analysts to revise forecasts upward.
data.description: Oil drilling company Noble Corp (NYSE: NE) released its fourth-quarter results on Wednesday, showing a mixed performance. The company reported earnings of 9 cents per share, falling short of the expected 21 cents per share. However, their quarterly sales stood at $764.412 million, surpassing the estimated $734.951 million. Looking ahead, Noble Corp anticipates FY2026 sales to range between $2.800 billion and $3.000 billion, contrasting with market projections of $3.012 billion. CEO Robert W. Eifler expressed satisfaction with the fourth quarter results, which contributed to a strong full-year 2025 Adjusted EBITDA performance. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: FFUN Group acquired Key Auto Group, expanding into Yorkton and Swan River with new dealerships and additional automotive brands, enhancing their presence across the Prairies.
data.description: A recent acquisition by FUN Group saw them acquiring Key Auto Group, leading to an expansion in Yorkton and Swan River. As a result, new dealerships and additional automotive brands will be introduced across the Prairies. This move marks a significant development in the automotive sector in Saskatchewan, demonstrating the growing presence of FUN Group. This acquisition is set to bring greater convenience and options for customers in the region.

data.title: Lochner appoints Karen Wiemelt, a veteran with over 35 yrs of experience, to its Board of Directors.
data.description: A seasoned professional in nuclear and energy sectors, Karen Wiemelt, has been announced as the newest addition to the Board of Directors at Lochner, a subsidiary of Egis Group based in Chicago. With over 35 years of industry expertise, Wiemelt's appointment signals a significant development for the company.

data.title: Strike looming at Children’s Aid Society of Toronto due to chronic understaffing and program cuts. CUPE Local 2316 voices concerns about child welfare crisis. Press conference on Feb 17.
data.description: In Toronto, frontline workers at the Children’s Aid Society are now able to legally strike as they face chronic understaffing and program cuts. CUPE Local 2316 highlights the strain on child welfare services due to years of provincial underfunding, putting children and families at risk. The union will address these issues at a press conference scheduled for Tuesday, February 17th at 12:30 p.m..

data.title: Smart Factory Market to reach USD 271.98 billion by 2032; grew from USD 132.08 billion in 2025. Adoption of Industry 4.0 principles driving growth.
data.description: In Pune, India, on February 13, 2026, the Smart Factory Market Global Outlook report by Maximize Market Research discusses the swift embrace of Industry 4.0 principles, intelligent automation, and interconnected manufacturing ecosystems. Valued at USD 132.08 billion in 2025, the market is witnessing a significant growth trend expected to continue through 2032.

data.title: Opportune LLP acquires PEP Consulting & Advocacy with Dan Romito leading sustainability & energy expansion.
data.description: In Houston, Opportune LLP, a prominent global business advisory firm specializing in energy, revealed the acquisition of PEP Consulting & Advocacy from Pickering Energy Partners LP. The deal includes the transition of Dan Romito to the Opportune team to spearhead sustainability and energy growth efforts. PEP Consulting & Advocacy, recognized for aiding private entities, public issuers, and asset management firms, will further strengthen Opportune's service offerings.

data.title: Roku stock surges as Q4 revenue hits $1.40 billion, EBITDA at $169.4 million, exceeding estimates. Analysts raise price targets.
data.description: Roku Inc's stocks surged after the company's fourth-quarter financial results were released. Key analysts like Justin Patterson (KeyBanc Capital Markets), Cory Carpenter (JPMorgan), and Daniel Kurnos (Benchmark) all reiterated positive ratings and raised their price targets to $130, $125, and $130 respectively. Roku reported revenue of $1.40 billion and EBITDA of $169.4 million, surpassing market estimates of $1.36 billion and $147 million. The company's outperformance was attributed to strong Platform revenue. Management projected first-quarter revenue and EBITDA of $1.20 billion and $130 million, above consensus figures. Roku is expected to become a high-teens Platform revenue grower with improved GAAP EPS and FCF. (Character count: 687)

data.title: Track Group reported strong Q1 FY26 results, with total revenue of $9.1M, up 5.2% from Q1 FY25, operating income of $0.8M, and net income of $0.5M. Despite higher costs affecting gross profit, the company's strategic investments are showing positive returns. Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $1.21M, with a cash balance of $3.6M. FY26 outlook includes revenue growth to $38M-$39M and EBITDA margin of 18%-19%. The company focuses on technology reinvestment and new programs for sustained growth. Check Benzinga for full details.
data.description: Track Group, Inc. reported financial results for Q1 FY26, showing total revenue of $9.1M, up 5.2% from Q1 FY25's $8.7M. Operating income increased to $0.8M from $0.1M in Q1 FY25, with net income for common shareholders at $0.5M compared to a loss of ($2.0M) in Q1 FY25. The growth was attributed to expansions in Florida and Illinois, offset by costs like device repairs. Adjusted EBITDA dropped slightly to $1.21M from $1.25M in Q1 FY25. Cash balance decreased to $3.6M from $4.1M, largely due to increased software costs. The company plans sustained growth in FY26, targeting revenue of $38M-$39M with an EBITDA margin of 18%-19%. Track Group is a global leader in offender tracking and monitoring services, listed as TRCK on OTCQB. (No. of characters: 763)

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group finds that treating learning programs as perks and not strategy hinders IT, with skills evolving faster.
data.description: Numerous companies continue to view learning as a perk rather than a crucial business function, despite the rapid evolution of IT skills outpacing traditional training timelines. Recent findings from Info-Tech Research Group reveal that episodic training structures are exacerbating the disparity as they fail to match the speed at which IT skills are advancing.

data.title: LP Building Solutions raises quarterly dividend to $0.30 per share for common stockholders.
data.description: In a recent announcement, LP, based in Nashville, Tennessee, has raised its quarterly cash dividend for common stockholders to $0.30 per share.

data.title: FDA approves Medtronic's Stealth AXiS system for spine surgery, designed for various preferences and complexities. Features LiveAlign segmental tracking for real-time visibility. Supports future cranial and ENT applications.
data.description: Medtronic plc's Stealth AXiS surgical system for spine surgery has been approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. The system, listed under NYSE: MDT, is now cleared for spine procedures in the United States, with potential for cranial and ENT applications pending 510(k) clearance. This platform is versatile to accommodate different surgeon preferences, clinical intricacies, and care environments, eliminating the need for multiple standalone technologies in hospitals and ambulatory surgery centers. An innovative feature of the system is LiveAlign segmental tracking, providing real-time visibility into anatomical motion, surgical adjustments, and patient alignment during spine surgeries. This approval marks a significant advancement in the field, providing enhanced capabilities for surgical precision and outcomes.
